summary: Tested Replacement Finder feature in Lineup Manager. All 6 features verified working correctly via UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replacement Finder feature verified working. Test user has friend 'Alex Surfer' for testing.

replacement_finder_quick_fill.notes: Shows 'Quick Fill 2 Seats' with purple gradient styling on Crew tab when open seats exist

replacement_finder_friend_label.notes: Friend suggestions display with 'Friend' label in green text (e.g., 'Alex Surfer' with 'Friend' label)

replacement_finder_auto_suggest_badge.notes: Purple 'Auto-Suggest' badge with lightning icon visible in Replacement Finder component

replacement_finder_one_click_invite.notes: Send icon visible on friend cards for one-click invite functionality

invite_tab_friends_section.notes: Invite tab shows 'Friends' section with 'Mutual' badge, displaying 'Alex Surfer' with 'Follows you' label and cyan 'Invite' button

open_seats_poker_style.notes: Open seats display as 'Open Seat #3' and 'Open Seat #4' with '?' avatar, 'Waiting for crew...' text, and 'Open' badge

crew_tab_elements: Test User E1 with Pending status and X remove button
Quick Fill 2 Seats with Auto-Suggest badge
Alex Surfer friend card with Friend label and send icon
Open Seat #3 with ? avatar and Open badge
Open Seat #4 with ? avatar and Open badge
invite_tab_elements: Invite code: EL0E76 with copy button
Alex Surfer with Surfer role, Follows you label, and Invite button
Tip about joining via invite code
